summary: Completed testing of Pet Soul Integration Phase 2 - Dine, Fit, Advisory pillar endpoints and abandoned cart email fix. All backend tests passed (12/12). Frontend Dine page reservation modal verified working with Pet Soul integration.
critical_code_review_comments: Email fix verified: 'to' field changed from [to_email] (list) to to_email (string) across all email functions in server.py
Pet Soul pillar endpoints correctly return 404 for invalid pet IDs
Dine reservation modal has Pet Soul integration with pet selector dropdown (visible when user has registered pets)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pet Soul Integration Phase 2 complete. New endpoints: /api/pet-vault/{pet_id}/record-dine-reservation, /api/pet-vault/{pet_id}/record-fit-activity, /api/pet-vault/{pet_id}/record-advisory-consult. All return 404 for invalid pet IDs. Dine page reservation modal has Pet Soul integration - pet selector dropdown appears when logged-in user has registered pets. Email fix applied - Resend 'to' field now uses string instead of list.

verification_summary.pet_soul_endpoints_404: VERIFIED - All 3 endpoints return 404 'Pet not found' for invalid pet IDs
verification_summary.abandoned_cart_email_endpoint: VERIFIED - Returns success:true with admin auth
verification_summary.dine_reservation_modal: VERIFIED - Opens on Reserve click, has 'About Your Pet' section with pet selector
verification_summary.email_to_field_fix: VERIFIED - All email functions use string for 'to' field, not list
